content.json:
# Security Overview

This workbook provides a high-level view of security events across your Sentinel workspace.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    TotalIncidents = count(),
    HighSeverity = countif(Severity == "High"),
    MediumSeverity = countif(Severity == "Medium"),
    LowSeverity = countif(Severity == "Low")
| project TotalIncidents, HighSeverity, MediumSeverity, LowSeverity
content.title: Incident Summary

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize IncidentCount = count() by Severity
| order by IncidentCount desc
content.title: Incidents by Severity

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize IncidentCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Incidents Over Time

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize AlertCount = count() by AlertName
| top 10 by AlertCount desc
content.title: Top 10 Alerts

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailureCount = count() by IPAddress
| top 10 by FailureCount desc
content.title: Top 10 Failed Sign-in IPs
